inputs.label: Primary Earner's PIA
inputs.businessContext: The primary insurance amount (PIA) of the worker whose earnings record the spousal benefit is claimed on.

businessContext_i18n.en: The primary insurance amount (PIA) of the worker whose earnings record the spousal benefit is claimed on.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eş faydasının talep edildiği çalışanın temel sigorta tutarı (PIA).

inputs.label: Spouse's Own PIA
inputs.businessContext: The spouse's own retirement benefit if they filed based on their own earnings record.

businessContext_i18n.en: The spouse's own retirement benefit if they filed based on their own earnings record.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşin kendi kazanç kaydına dayanarak dosyaladığı kendi emeklilik faydası.

inputs.label: Spouse's Filing Age
inputs.businessContext: The age at which the spouse applies for spousal benefits.

businessContext_i18n.en: The age at which the spouse applies for spousal benefits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşin eş faydası için başvurduğu yaş.

inputs.label: Spouse's Full Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: The age at which the spouse can receive unreduced benefits. Typically 66-67 depending on birth year.

businessContext_i18n.en: The age at which the spouse can receive unreduced benefits. Typically 66-67 depending on birth year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşin indirimsiz fayda alabileceği yaş. Doğum yılına bağlı olarak genellikle 66-67.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
